arts.ttl: West Ham players pay tribute to Michail Antonio after horror car crash with touching gesture
arts.sum: West Ham players, who faced Wolves on Monday night, have worn T-shirts with the name and number of Michail Antonio on the back following his horror car accident on Saturday

arts.ttl: ‘Warrior’ Michail Antonio backed to come back ‘stronger’ from car crash injuries
arts.sum: ‘Everyone loves Mich, he is a big character,’ Antonio’s West Ham team-mate Jarrod Bowen said.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs. Wolves team news: Both teams make changes for 'El Sackico' Premier League fixture
arts.sum: West Ham United and Wolverhampton Wanderers announce their starting lineups for Monday's Premier League fixture at the London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Jarrod Bowen sends message of support to ‘warrior’ Michail Antonio after car accident: ‘Everyone loves him’
arts.sum: The West Ham forward is in a stable condition after a serious car accident on Saturday

arts.ttl: Jarrod Bowen reveals West Ham dressing room's fears after Michail Antonio car crash
arts.sum: West Ham captain Jarrod Bowen has spoken about the response from the squad after they found out that striker Michail Antonio had been involved in a serious car crash on Saturday

arts.ttl: West Ham v Wolves: Premier League – live

arts.ttl: Emerson and Summerville start Wolves clash
arts.sum: Alongside Todibo on the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, defenders Aaron Cresswell and Coufal, midfielders Lucas Paquetá, Guido Rodríguez and Luis Guilherme and forwards Ings and Niclas Füllkrug, who marked his return from injury with a first West Ham goal at Leicester. West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Kilman, Emerson, Soler, Souček, Álvarez, Kudus, Summerville, Bowen ©

arts.ttl: West Ham to show support for Michail Antonio ahead of Wolves clash
arts.sum: The forward is in a stable condition following a serious road accident
